statusLine.command: sh -c 'b=$(ls -1 "$HOME"/.cache/red-skills/bundles/dev-*.bundle.min.mjs 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1); [ -z "$b" ] && b=$(ls -1 "$HOME"/.claude/plugins/cache/red-skills/dev/*/skills/engineering/afk/bin/afk.mjs 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1); [ -n "$b" ] && exec node "$b" statusline'
